name: Suspicious MsiExec Directory Detected
description: Detection of `msiexec.exe` being launched from a directory other than its standard system locations. Adversaries may use a malicious copy of `msiexec.exe` or a malicious MSI installer to execute code and evade security defenses, which is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: the process **`msiexec.exe`** was launched from an unusual directory, **{image}**. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1036**), where an adversary is attempting to masquerade as a legitimate process to execute malicious code. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image of msiexec.exe, which is expected to be in an unusual location.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
